_publications._publicationTitle: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting to Characterize Childhood and Young Adult Brain Tumors.

_contextSnippet: However, T1 and T2 differed between LGG and HG tumors among 20 subjects with measurable brain tumors (Table 1, 17 LGG, 3 HG tumors: T1 p = 0.007, T2 p = 0.013).
details: T1 and T2 values differed between low-grade gliomas and high-grade tumors (T1 p=0.007, T2 p=0.013)
